blocks.text: Suzuka crowns a season: four points separate Russell and Antonelli
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Aramco Japanese Grand Prix, Suzuka — Russell 51pts, Antonelli 47pts, every lap counts
No wins for either man yet this season — just relentless points accumulation. Leclerc sits 17 back at 34pts. Suzuka's unforgiving layout rewards precision; one mistake reshapes the championship.
🚴 Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic, cobbled sectors in Belgium — Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard lead Norwegian charge
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold and Abrahamsen — Norway's best Spring Classic shot this week
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Magnus Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026 — his World Championship challenger bid begins
